source_basis.note: Supabase provides Postgres, connection options, tables, imports, and RLS-backed security guidance for application data.
RLS can combine with Supabase Auth for user-owned row isolation and is required before tenant tables are exposed.
Project backup and restore posture must be reviewed before staging is treated as persistent user data storage.
Supabase Storage is bucket/object storage with access policies; it is a future file-artifact option, not the structured membership source of truth.
Railway volumes provide persistent files for a service, but they are not selected as Autofolio tenant account, membership, payment evidence, or integration-secret metadata source of truth.
External staging environment values are platform state and remain Owner/R3; this packet does not write them.

decision_summary.selected_rationale: External or member-facing staging needs Auth ownership, row policies, auditability, backups, migration review, and cross-user tests. The current local encrypted vault is a prototype store and is not a durable multi-tenant source of truth.

options.current_repo_usage: membership_requests, local approved users, and user_integrations prototype records use app.ui.vault under AUTOFOLIO_HOME.
portfolio, order, execution, acknowledgement, and profile local repository paths use SQLite-backed local runtime data.

storage_surfaces.staging_rule: External staging must not use local vault users as the durable account authority.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Owner-selected Supabase staging project, migration review, profile RLS, auth callback/session tests.

storage_surfaces.staging_rule: Signup, status lookup, approval, deposit_pending, and active transitions require row ownership and audit events before external users.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Membership tables, applicant lookup non-disclosure policy, approval event table, cross-user read/write tests.

storage_surfaces.staging_rule: Grant state must be queryable by the owning user and Owner only.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Grant table RLS, Owner/admin override policy, expiry tests.

storage_surfaces.current_local_surface: membership event evidence fields and TASK-111 policy
storage_surfaces.staging_rule: Only minimal masked payment evidence fields may persist; raw statements and real bank account values stay out.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Payment evidence policy gate, redaction tests, non-disclosure tests, retention/delete plan.

storage_surfaces.staging_rule: Metadata may live in Supabase; raw provider tokens or payloads require the secret store plan and must not be returned through user APIs.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Secret metadata table RLS, secret-store implementation plan, rotation/delete/audit tests, server-only key review.

storage_surfaces.current_local_surface: SQLite runtime tables and local service state
storage_surfaces.staging_rule: External member staging cannot share local runtime files across tenants without owner fields, worker context, and order-intent isolation.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Tenant isolation matrix, per-user engine safety contract, append-only intent/audit tables, no live KIS activation.

storage_surfaces.staging_rule: Owner actions, member actions, approval transitions, secret lifecycle, and payment evidence references need append-only audit events.
storage_surfaces.required_before_external_users: Audit table RLS, append-only policy, actor/subject/event timestamp tests.

owner_only_actions: Select or create the Supabase staging project outside this repository.
Approve and apply any Supabase migration, RLS policy, grant, storage bucket, backup, or advisor remediation.
Write platform environment variables outside git.
Approve whether Railway volumes are needed for non-tenant artifacts.
Approve any staging use with external users or real customer data.
forbidden_actions: Do not create Supabase, Railway, Vercel, database, storage bucket, or volume resources for this task.
Do not create or apply migrations.
Do not write external environment variables.
Do not store real customer data, payment evidence, provider tokens, KIS credentials, or secret material in repository files.
Do not make local vault, SQLite, Railway volume, or runtime filesystem the external staging tenant source of truth.
Do not publish a staging URL or mark can_launch true.
